children.name: ce_agents_heading_before
children.label: Heading — before accent
children.default:
AI that acts.
Not just advises.

children.name: ce_agents_lede
children.label: Lead paragraph
children.default: Bidgely's agentic layer runs the workflows your team currently does manually across every customer touchpoint. From IVR personalization to campaign triggers, agents work continuously without adding headcount.

default.ce_agents_heading_before:
AI that acts.
Not just advises.
default.ce_agents_lede: Bidgely's agentic layer runs the workflows your team currently does manually across every customer touchpoint. From IVR personalization to campaign triggers, agents work continuously without adding headcount.

children.name: ce_agents_value_desc
children.label: Description
children.default: From deflected calls, improved enrollment, and automated DSM workflows

default.ce_agents_value_desc: From deflected calls, improved enrollment, and automated DSM workflows

children.name: card_body
children.label: Body
children.default: Detects the likely call reason before the customer finishes speaking — pulling from their live appliance profile and billing delta. Routes and resolves at the IVR level without a CSR.

children.name: card_stat
children.label: Stat line
children.default: Up to 50,000 at-risk customers handled per program cycle

default.card_body: Detects the likely call reason before the customer finishes speaking — pulling from their live appliance profile and billing delta. Routes and resolves at the IVR level without a CSR.
default.card_stat: Up to 50,000 at-risk customers handled per program cycle

default.card_body: Continuously monitors usage patterns and triggers personalized email, SMS, or portal messages before the customer has a reason to call. Picks the right channel and timing for each premise.
default.card_stat: 15%+ reduction in CSR churn from reduced inbound volume

default.card_body: Identifies program-eligible customers, segments by propensity, and runs targeted recruitment journeys — including follow-ups, re-engagements, and confirmation — without manual campaign management.
default.card_stat: 4x reduction in marketing cost per enrollment
